text: Rust is a systems programming language focused on safety and performance
Python is a high-level scripting language popular for data science
C++ is a systems language with manual memory management and high performance
JavaScript is the language of the web used for frontend and backend development
Go is a compiled language designed for simplicity and concurrency
TypeScript adds static typing to JavaScript for large scale applications
Rust ownership model prevents memory bugs without garbage collection
Java is a compiled language running on the JVM used in enterprise systems
Haskell is a purely functional programming language with strong type system
C is the foundational systems language that influenced many modern languages
Swift is Apples language for iOS and macOS development with safety features
Kotlin is a modern language on the JVM used for Android development
